title: Intensely Crispy Irish Lamb Tagine
description: A traditional Irish dish with a twist, featuring crispy lamb and a sweet sugar syrup, cooked to perfection in a tagine pot, this recipe is sugar free friendly and bursting with energizing flavors
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Heat the olive oil in the tagine pot over medium high heat.
Add the lamb pieces to the pot and cook until browned on all sides.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger to the pot and cook for 1 minute.
Add the bonito flakes, sugar free syrup, dried thyme, salt, and black pepper to the pot and stir to combine.
Cover the pot and transfer to the preheated oven.
Cook for 2 hours or until the lamb is tender and the sauce has thickened.
Remove the pot from the oven and sprinkle the chopped parsley over the top.
Return the pot to the oven and cook for an additional 10 minutes or until the parsley is crispy.
